pdp_sections.title: Know your product
subtitle: Description
pdp_sections.value: This Little Collars fashion-forward silhouette is timeless and aesthetically beautiful. An ideal piece for all Rakhi/Diwali/ Ramadan parties and weddings! The jacket is paired with a silk kurta and pajama set. Ornamental Reindeer hand embroidery adds glamour and elegance to this set.

attributes.label: Address of Manufacturer/ Packer/ Importer
attributes.value: 19 Canal South Road,d-404, 3rd Floor,paridhan Garments Park,pincode 700015

pdp_sections.title: Return and exchange policy
subtitle: Know more about return and exchange
pdp_sections.value: This product is eligible for returns or replacement. Please initiate returns/replacements from the 'My Orders' section in the App within 7 days of delivery. Kindly ensure the product is in its original condition with all tags attached.
